title: Graphical Procedure for the Convolution Sum
summary: This page introduces a graphical method for evaluating the discrete-time convolution sum by inverting, shifting, and multiplying signals before summing over the overlap. It also begins Example 3.23, applying the method to exponential sequences x[n] = (0.8)^n and g[n] = (0.3)^n, and includes Drill 3.17 on response to multiple inputs.
